title.en: Packing Your Bag for the Day

phrases.en: Kate sets her empty backpack on the bed.
phrases.zh: 凯特把空背包放在床上。

phrases.en: She unzips the main pocket and opens the bag wide.
phrases.zh: 她拉开主隔层的拉链，把包敞开。

phrases.en: First, she slides her thin laptop carefully inside.
phrases.zh: 首先，她把轻薄的笔记本电脑小心地放进去。

phrases.en: Then she wraps the cord and packs the charger next to it.
phrases.zh: 然后她把电源线缠好，把充电器放在它旁边。

phrases.en: She tucks her leather wallet into the small front pocket.
phrases.zh: 她把皮夹塞进前面的小口袋里。

phrases.en: She drops her house keys in so she does not lose them.
phrases.zh: 她把家里的钥匙丢进去，免得弄丢。

phrases.en: She slips a notebook and a blue pen along the side.
phrases.zh: 她把一本笔记本和一支蓝笔顺着侧边塞进去。

phrases.en: She stands a full water bottle upright in the side mesh.
phrases.zh: 她把一瓶满满的水竖着放进侧边的网袋里。

phrases.en: She also adds a snack and some tissues for later.
phrases.zh: 她还放了点零食和一些纸巾，留着待会儿用。

phrases.en: She quickly checks that nothing important is missing.
phrases.zh: 她快速检查一下，确认没漏掉重要的东西。

phrases.en: Then she zips the bag up tightly.
phrases.zh: 然后她把包的拉链拉紧。

phrases.en: Finally, she slings the heavy backpack over her shoulder.
phrases.zh: 最后，她把沉甸甸的背包甩到肩上。

phrases.en: Now she is ready to head out the door.
